description: Payloads exploiting missing base-uri directive — <base> tag redirects relative script URLs to attacker-controlled origin

payloads.description: Base tag injection — redirects all relative URLs to attacker origin
payloads.csp_bypass: Missing base-uri allows <base> tag to hijack relative script paths

payloads.description: Base + relative script — loads app.js from attacker.com
payloads.csp_bypass: Base tag makes relative script-src load from attacker domain

payloads.description: Base with target — opens hijacked links in new tab
